commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `waitForAgentJob` so the outer fallback timer can return pending timeout snapshots, and adds fake-timer regression coverage for provider timeout and transient-abort recovery cases.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +85. Total +97 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source and the linked issue show the outer wait timer can drop pending timeout snapshots; the remaining PR defect is source-reproducible by using a pending soft timeout phase such as `gateway_draining` before the retry grace expires.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can replace the discriminator and add the missing soft-phase regression without a product decision.

target.title: fix: forward pending timeout snapshot in waitForAgentJob fallback timer
target.author: huangting-xy
